tagline: Advanced Lead Full Stack Developer | JavaScript, Angular, .NET Core, Node.js. Building scalable, client-focused applications that deliver real business value.
description: Advanced Lead Full Stack Developer focused on scalable, client-centric enterprise applications, cloud integrations, and high-quality delivery.

roles.detailed: Angular Architect · Full Stack Engineer · Cloud Integrations

bio: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience in Angular-based front-end development and enterprise web application design. I specialize in building scalable single-page applications using Angular 18+, TypeScript, Redux/Ngrx patterns, .NET MVC, and modern UI technologies. I have hands-on experience integrating applications with Microsoft Azure cloud services and implementing CI/CD pipelines to enable secure, high-quality deployments.

bullets: Led a team of 3 developers through full lifecycle development and deployment of a high-impact Angular platform for Credit Bureau agents.
Delivered a measurable 40% improvement in business workflow efficiency.
Integrated Salesforce and Angular apps via a custom Canvas component using a micro front-end approach.
Integrated HGV ONEX APIs with 4 distinct HGV partners, building advanced search and booking workflows.
Advanced Equifax CCMS OAD Phase 2 features originally planned for 2025 and enabled on-time completion.
Improved user engagement by 20% with responsive SPA experiences and robust UI architecture.
Resolved critical defects and improved system stability and performance by 15%.
Maintained high engineering quality through PR reviews, linting, unit tests, and manual validation.
experience.desc: Led enterprise Angular delivery, Salesforce Canvas integration, and API-driven platform enhancements at EPAM, driving measurable gains in efficiency, performance, and engagement.

bullets: Led a team of 4 junior associates across Unified Assessment Form (UAF) and 360 ValueMeter initiatives.
Built core capabilities using Angular 9 and .NET Core 3.1 REST APIs.
Enhanced UI quality and usability using jQuery, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and CSS3.
Contributed to requirement analysis, design documentation, and PostgreSQL data modeling.
Delivered features that reduced client effort significantly in assessment workflows.
experience.desc: Led cross-functional implementation of UAF and 360 ValueMeter at Accenture, combining Angular and .NET services with strong delivery discipline.

bullets: Developed RoadMap Assessment using .NET Core, Angular 10, and TypeScript.
Built business-level IT Revenue, Spend, Summary, and Insight visualizations using D3.js.
Implemented value-added enhancements and innovative features to improve platform impact.
experience.desc: Delivered RoadMap Assessment features, analytics visualizations, and product improvements using Angular, .NET Core, and D3.js.

bullets: Built PMO Data application modules for staffing, finance, and demand reporting.
Developed complex business logic and REST APIs using .NET MVC.
Created KnockoutJS and Redux-based UI workflows and Highcharts visual analytics.
Implemented data export and interactive reporting experiences for enterprise users.
experience.desc: Built enterprise reporting capabilities in PMO Data using .NET MVC, KnockoutJS, Redux patterns, and charting-driven UX.

Designed the RoadMap Assessment platform for evaluating client journeys at Service Line and Business Unit levels, then introduced the Unified Assessment Form (UAF) that let clients build tailored assessments and cut assessment workload by 80%.
